semantic_invariants: TDQE signs TD Quote; QGS daemon only transports
TD returns Quote/key bytes to RP/KMS, which sends Evidence to Verifier
Verifier retained challenge state is internal state, not a transport artifact
PCS authority is distinct from PCCS cache
Verifier appraises Evidence while RP/KMS owns release
K/D/E bind key, context, and exact Quote independently under a version-fixed profile
Result/time/E/K/PoP/one-time state are required before release
deny/replay/expiry/invalid collateral/failed PoP/terminal error result in NO KEY
